interface.longDescription: The Figma app in ChatGPT generates beautifully designed assets, presentations, and diagrams. Use the app to turn conversations into social posts, digital ads, marketing assets, and more. Give the Figma app context about a presentation like a suggested outline or a goal, and it will generate a polished slide deck. The Figma app can also turn prompts into flow charts, Gantt charts, or other diagrams in FigJam. Move anything you create from ChatGPT to Figma and then edit, share, and collaborate.
defaultPrompt: Read attached PRD and create flowchart of 2FA flow
